query:
UPDATE website_administrators 
                SET role = $1, 
                    permissions = $2, 
                    status = $3,
                    account_id = $4,
                    invitation_token = $5,
                    accepted_at = CASE WHEN $3 = 'active' THEN now() ELSE NULL END,
                    updated_at = now()
                WHERE id = $6
                RETURNING id, email, role, status, invited_at
